data_type_evidence: h-e1/code/data/dataset.py:43-48 loads Waterbirds metadata from metadata.csv with pd.read_csv, and h-e1/code/data/dataset.py:75-77 opens image files from img_filename.
h-e1/code/data/waterbirds/metadata.csv:1-5 contains benchmark image filenames and labels from the Waterbirds dataset.

h-m-integrated/code/run_validation.py:91-110 loads trained checkpoints and re-extracts embeddings from WaterbirdsDataset; h-m-integrated/code/run_validation.py:137-178 and h-m-integrated/code/run_validation.py:197-259 compute AMI and delta-WGA from those checkpoint-derived embeddings.

h-m-integrated/code/experiment_log.txt:12-15 records an actual training run on Waterbirds ('Loading Waterbirds dataset...', 'Train samples: 4795', 'Training for 20 epochs...'), and checkpoints are present under h-m-integrated/code/checkpoints/{simclr,lassl}/seed_0.
